chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4949 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "إِنَّ أَهْلَ اَلرِّيِّ فِي اَلدُّنْيَا مِنَ اَلْمُسْكِرِ يَمُوتُونَ عِطَاشاً وَ يُحْشَرُونَ عِطَاشاً وَ يَدْخُلُونَ اَلنَّارَ عِطَاشاً ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4949 - Imam (as) said:
"Indeed, those who indulge in intoxicants in this world will die thirsty, be resurrected thirsty, and enter the Fire thirsty."
